note: Phase 1 seed. Clippy ships ~600 lints grouped into correctness, style, complexity, perf, pedantic, nursery, suspicious, restriction. Lich uses the stable clippy name as rule_id (e.g. clippy::unwrap_used). Suspicious/restriction security framings (e.g. clippy::mem_forget with unsafe context) defer to Hydra.

correctness_m1.description: Clippy correctness lints — panic / UB / logical bug candidates. Routed to M1 / M5.

idiom_m7.description: Clippy style lints — idiomatic Rust. Routed to M7 (Idiom-fit).

complexity_m7.description: Clippy complexity lints — oversized signatures, deeply nested control flow. Routed to M7 (Simplicity).

naming_m7.description: Clippy naming / case lints. Routed to M7 (Clarity).

testability_m7.description: Rules flagging test-hostile shapes (hidden state, non-deterministic ordering, missing #[test] coverage). Routed to M7 (Testability). Phase 1 seed.

security_defer_to_hydra.description: Security-framed clippy + rustsec advisories — Hydra R3 owns these (CWE lane). Listed for provenance; never mapped.
